info.title: Hotel Booking API
info.description: A professional hotel booking API with full features

401.description: Unauthorized

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of bookings with optional filtering.
get.description:
Requires Admin role authorization.
Supports comprehensive filtering and pagination with validation.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of bookings per page (default: 10).

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires admin privileges.

post.summary: Creates a new booking in the system.
post.description:
Requires Customer or Admin role authorization.
Validates room availability and calculates total price automatically.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user making the booking

400.description: Validation failed or room not available.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires authentication.

get.summary: Retrieves a specific booking by its unique identifier.
get.description: Returns detailed booking information including hotel, room, and user details.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the booking.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires authentication.

patch.description:
Requires Customer or Admin role authorization.
Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be updated.
Cannot update cancelled or completed bookings.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the booking to update.

requestBody.description: The fields you want to update.

400.description: Validation failed or booking cannot be updated.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires Customer or admin privileges.

delete.description:
Requires Owner or Admin role authorization.
By default, performs soft delete to maintain data integrity.
Restores room availability if booking is active.

parameters.name: isSoft
parameters.description: If true, marks the booking as deleted instead of removing it permanently (default: true)

parameters.name: forceDelete
parameters.description: If true, forces deletion even if booking is active (default: false)

400.description: Cannot delete active booking without force delete.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires owner or admin privileges.

get.summary: Retrieves all bookings for a specific user.
get.description:
Requires Owner or Admin role authorization.
Returns all bookings belonging to the specified user with pagination.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of bookings per page (default: 10).

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires owner or admin privileges.

get.summary: Retrieves all bookings for a specific hotel.
get.description:
Requires Admin or HotelManager role authorization.
Returns all bookings for rooms in the specified hotel with pagination.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of bookings per page (default: 10).

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires admin or hotel manager privileges.

post.description:
Requires Owner or Admin role authorization.
Changes booking status to Cancelled and restores room availability.
Cannot cancel already cancelled or completed bookings.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the booking to cancel.

400.description: Cannot cancel booking due to invalid status.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires owner or admin privileges.

patch.summary: Changes the status of an existing booking.
patch.description:
Requires Admin or HotelManager role authorization.
Validates status transitions based on business rules.
Automatically manages room availability based on status changes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the booking to update.

requestBody.description: The new status and optional notes.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires admin or hotel manager privileges.

get.summary: Checks if a room is available for the specified date range.
get.description:
Public endpoint - no authentication required.
Checks for conflicting bookings in the specified date range.
Useful for checking availability before creating or updating bookings.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The ID of the room to check.

get.summary: Calculates the total price for a booking with the specified room and date range.
get.description:
Public endpoint - no authentication required.
Calculates total price based on room rate and stay duration.
Returns detailed price breakdown including room rate, days, and total cost.

400.description: Invalid date range or room not found.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of hotels with optional filtering by city, country, or rating.
get.description: Supports comprehensive filtering and pagination with validation.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of hotels per page (default: 10).

post.summary: Creates a new hotel in the system.
post.description:
Requires **Admin** role authorization.  
The API will return a `201 Created` response with the location of the new hotel.

requestBody.description: The hotel details to create, including name, description, address, city, country, and rating.

400.description: Validation failed — one or more fields are invalid.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires admin privileges.

get.summary: Retrieves a specific hotel by its unique identifier.
get.description: Returns detailed hotel information including room statistics.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the hotel.

patch.description:
Requires **Admin** or **HotelManager** role authorization.  
Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be updated.
Hotel name must remain unique if changed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the hotel to update.

requestBody.description:
The fields you want to update.  
You can send only the properties that need changes (partial update supported).

400.description: Validation failed — one or more fields are invalid.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires admin or hotel manager privileges.

delete.description:
Requires **Admin** role.  
Soft delete preferred to maintain data integrity.

400.description: Cannot delete hotel with active bookings.

401.description: Unauthorized – Admin only.

post.summary: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for a booking.

get.summary: Gets a payment by its ID.
Gets the payment linked to a booking.
Retrieves a paginated list of reviews with optional filtering.
get.description:
Requires Admin role authorization.
Supports comprehensive filtering and pagination with validation.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of reviews per page (default: 10).

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires admin privileges.

post.summary: Creates a new review in the system.
post.description:
Requires Customer or Admin role authorization.
Validates user and hotel existence and rating constraints.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user creating the review

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires authentication.

get.summary: Retrieves a specific review by its unique identifier.
get.description: Returns detailed review information including hotel and user details.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the review.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires authentication.

patch.description:
This endpoint requires authentication.  
Only the owner of the review (or an admin) can update the review.  
Supports partial update operations (PATCH).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the review to update.

requestBody.description: The fields to update in the review. Supports partial updates.

400.description: Invalid data was provided (e.g., rating outside allowed range).

404.description: The specified review was not found.

401.description: Unauthorized — only authenticated users can access this endpoint.

403.description: Forbidden — users can only update their own reviews.

delete.description:
Requires Owner or Admin role authorization.
By default, performs soft delete to maintain data integrity.
Users can only delete their own reviews.

parameters.name: isSoft
parameters.description: If true, marks the review as deleted instead of removing it permanently (default: true)

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires owner or admin privileges.

get.summary: Retrieves all reviews for a specific hotel.
get.description:
Public endpoint - no authentication required.
Returns all reviews for the specified hotel with pagination.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of reviews per page (default: 10).

get.summary: Retrieves all reviews for a specific user.
get.description:
Requires Owner or Admin role authorization.
Returns all reviews belonging to the specified user with pagination.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of reviews per page (default: 10).

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires owner or admin privileges.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of rooms with optional filtering.
get.description: Supports comprehensive filtering and pagination with validation.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of rooms per page (default: 10).

post.summary: Creates a new room in the system.
post.description:
Requires **Admin** or **HotelManager** role authorization.  
The API will return a `201 Created` response with the location of the new room.
Room number must be unique within the hotel.

requestBody.description: The room details to create, including hotel ID, room number, type, price, capacity, and description.

400.description: Validation failed — one or more fields are invalid.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires admin or hotel manager privileges.

get.summary: Retrieves a specific room by its unique identifier.
get.description: Returns detailed room information including hotel details.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the room.

patch.description:
Requires **Admin** or **HotelManager** role authorization.  
Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be updated.
Room number must remain unique within the hotel if changed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the room to update.

requestBody.description:
The fields you want to update.  
You can send only the properties that need changes (partial update supported).

400.description: Validation failed — one or more fields are invalid.

401.description: Unauthorized — the request requires admin or hotel manager privileges.

delete.summary: Deletes a room by ID (soft or hard delete).
delete.description:
Requires **Admin** role authorization.  
Soft delete preserves data integrity by preventing hard deletion of active rooms.

parameters.name: isSoft
parameters.description:
If true, performs a soft delete (default).  
Soft delete keeps the room in the database but marks it as deleted.

parameters.name: forceDelete
parameters.description:
If true, allows deletion even if the room has active bookings.  
Use with caution.

400.description: Room cannot be deleted due to active bookings.

401.description: Unauthorized — admin privileges required.

get.summary: Retrieves available rooms for a specific date range.
get.description: Checks room availability by examining existing bookings and room status.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of all available room types.

post.summary:
Handles incoming Stripe webhook events.
Validates the webhook signature and processes payment-related events.
